Everything is OK until something bad happens, no support, no help.
This is part of the report I filled with the ACCC:
1. Misleading and Poor Customer Service
I placed an order with the company, and the experience has been frustrating and inconsistent:
The company sent me the wrong item, then told me I could keep it.
Later, they reversed their position, saying I must return it or they would withhold my actual order (valued at only $33).
I received conflicting information from customer service over the phone on multiple occasions.
The overall handling of the issue has been extremely poor and unclear.

While we don't verify specific claims because reviewers' opinions are their own, we may label reviews as "Verified" when we can confirm a business interaction took place. Read more

To protect platform integrity, every review on our platform—verified or not—is screened by our 24/7 automated software. ## Company details

1. Embroidery service

#### Written by the company

Pop Culture Embroidery is your go-to source for over 100,000 high-quality embroidery and vector designs ready to use right away. Whether you run a print shop, an embroidery business, or just love crafting, you’ll find logos for popular brands, bands, games, sports teams, and more. All files are professionally digitized or vectorized so you don’t have to waste time cleaning up messy artwork or fixing stitch paths. Just download and start stitching or printing with confidence. Our huge collection saves you money compared to buying single designs elsewhere, and you get instant access anytime you need it. If you’re tired of searching all over the internet for reliable files, Pop Culture Embroidery is here to help make your projects easier and faster. Visit www.popcultureembroidery.com and see how simple it can be to bring your ideas to life.See more

#### We use technology to protect platform integrity, but we don't fact-check reviews

While we don't verify specific claims because reviewers' opinions are their own, we may label reviews as "Verified" when we can confirm a business interaction took place. Read more

To protect platform integrity, every review on our platform—verified or not—is screened by our 24/7 automated software. This technology is designed to identify and remove content that breaches our guidelines, including reviews that are not based on a genuine experience. We recognise we may not catch everything, and you can flag anything you think we may have missed. Read more

## Review summary

Based on reviews, created with AI

Reviewers overwhelmingly had a great experience with this company. Customers are particularly pleased with the product selection, often finding rare and unique items not readily available elsewhere. The prices are considered fair, and many reviewers appreciate the value they receive, especially highlighting mystery boxes and discounted items. People consistently praise the quality of the products, noting that items arrive in mint condition. Consumers are impressed with the delivery service, mentioning fast dispatch and quick arrival times. The company's packaging is consistently described as excellent, with individual boxes and protective measures ensuring items are well-protected during transit. While opinions on pre-orders are mixed, with some experiencing delays, the overall sentiment towards the company's products, prices, and delivery service remains highly positive. See more
